name: unifi-netops
description: Network-engineer subagent + reference skill for UniFi networks run alongside Debian/Ubuntu and Windows 11 hosts. Diagnoses fabric/STP/link-flap and loop issues, reviews UniFi gateway/switch config, and handles host NIC/VLAN/bonding/macvlan and Docker Swarm overlay networking. Use for any UniFi-adjacent network troubleshooting or network-config review.
